name: Women's Plastic Cateye Sunglasses - A New Day™ Black: Maximum UV Protection, Impact-Resistant, Recycled Plastic Frame
description:
Turn heads as you step out wearing these Plastic Cateye Sunglasses from A New Day™. These cateye sunglasses feature black frames with gray lenses, making for a stunning addition to your accessory collection. Made from recycled plastic, the UV-protection lenses help keep your eyes shielded from the sun.

A New Day™: Style that goes wherever you do.
